skills.summary: Write Lua: batch-activate only needed lua_module_*; skip board_hardware unless unknown. read_file sources: scripts/+lua_list path. prefer ep.publish_message("text").
List/run Lua; read_file a script as scripts/<path from lua_list_scripts>. IM args often auto-injected.
Canonical Lua templates (xpcall, cleanup, delay in loops). Button+IM: string publish_message in callbacks.
